pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 8) and export_result.sh (line 6). Directory structure created and output file expected at this path.
AutoCAD DXF standard color index (verified via gohtx.com): 7 = White (FFFFFF). Matches task description 'Color: White/Black/7'. Consistent with verifier.py line 95 which requires FRAME layer color 7.
AutoCAD DXF standard color index (verified via gohtx.com): 3 = Green (00FF00). Matches task description 'Color: Green'. Consistent with verifier.py line 96 which requires SHELVES layer color 3.
AutoCAD DXF standard color index (verified via gohtx.com): 4 = Cyan (00FFFF). Matches task description 'Color: Cyan'. Consistent with verifier.py line 97 which requires TEXT layer color 4.
AutoCAD DXF standard color index (verified via gohtx.com): 1 = Red (FF0000). Matches task description 'Color: Red'. Consistent with verifier.py line 98 which requires DIMENSIONS layer color 1.

Task description explicitly states 'Draw the outer frame rectangle: width 3000mm, height 2500mm, starting at (0,0)'. Metadata accurately reflects specification. Verifier checks for 2700-3300mm range (10% tolerance).

Task description explicitly states 'Draw the outer frame rectangle: width 3000mm, height 2500mm, starting at (0,0)'. Metadata accurately reflects specification. Verifier checks for 2250-2750mm range (10% tolerance).
Task description explicitly states 'Draw a header panel rectangle: width 3000mm, height 400mm, placed at the top (bottom-left at 0, 2100)'. Metadata accurately reflects specification.
Task description explicitly states 'Place Shelf 1 at y=700'. Metadata accurately reflects specification.
Task description explicitly states 'Place Shelf 2 at y=1400'. Metadata accurately reflects specification.

Task description explicitly states 'Add text 'ACME DISPLAYS' inside the header panel area'. Metadata accurately reflects specification. Verifier checks for text containing 'ACME' on TEXT layer (line 164).

DXF standard entity types verified via AutoCAD DXF Reference and ezdxf documentation. All three are valid DXF entity types. LWPOLYLINE (lightweight polyline), LINE (straight line), and POLYLINE (polyline) are standard for CAD drawings. These would be appropriate entities for drawing rectangular frames.
DXF standard entity type. LINE is the appropriate entity type for drawing horizontal shelf lines (line segments). Verified via DXF standard documentation.
DXF standard entity types verified via ezdxf documentation. TEXT is single-line text entity, MTEXT is multi-line text entity (introduced in DXF R13/R14). Both are appropriate for text content.
DXF standard entity type for dimensions. Verified via AutoCAD DXF Reference and ezdxf documentation. DIMENSION entity is used for linear dimensions showing measurements.

privileged_info_summary: booth_elevation is a synthetic task that requires an AI agent to create a trade show booth elevation drawing in LibreCAD. The drawing must contain four layers with specific colors: FRAME (white, color 7), SHELVES (green, color 3), TEXT (cyan, color 4), and DIMENSIONS (red, color 1). The outer frame is 3000mm wide by 2500mm tall with a 400mm header panel. Two horizontal shelves are positioned at y=700mm and y=1400mm. The text 'ACME DISPLAYS' must appear in the header area. All geometric specifications (dimensions, colors, layer names, entity types) are standard DXF format specifications and are consistent with the task description.
